sources.source_dataset_name: CMS Payroll-Based Journal Daily Nurse Staffing
sources.source_level: official CMS PBJ local CSV export
sources.notes: Generated offline from manually supplied PBJ CSV files. PBJ-calculated staffing metrics remain the actual staffing values in this export.

sources.source_level: official CMS Provider Information local CSV export
sources.notes: Optional facility metadata, case-mix comparison, and CMS Care Compare rating context merged by CCN. PBJ-derived facility and staffing values are retained when Provider Information values are blank or unmatched.

sources.source_level: official CMS SNF Enrollments local CSV export
sources.notes: Optional legal organization and affiliation context merged by CCN. These fields do not replace Provider Information display metadata.

sources.source_dataset_name: CMS Nursing Home Quality Measures Claims
sources.source_level: official CMS Quality Measures Claims local CSV export
sources.notes: Optional facility-level claims-based quality-measure context merged by CCN. These measures are imported from CMS and are not calculated by this staffing tool.

data_quality.average_census_method: Simple average of daily MDScensus source values for the facility-quarter.
data_quality.ct_direct_care_comparison_note: PBJ-derived Connecticut screening estimates use Title 19 Sec. 19-13-D8t(m)(6) comparison points and exclude Hrs_RNDON, Hrs_RNadmin, and Hrs_LPNadmin. They are not formal compliance determinations.

field_map.provider_name: Provider Information Provider Name when matched and nonblank; otherwise PBJ PROVNAME
field_map.city: Provider Information Provider City when matched and nonblank; otherwise PBJ CITY
field_map.state: Provider Information Provider State when matched and nonblank; otherwise PBJ STATE
field_map.zip_code: Provider Information ZIP code when matched
field_map.phone_number: Provider Information phone number when matched
field_map.certified_beds: Provider Information number of certified beds when matched
field_map.ownership_type: Provider Information ownership type when matched
field_map.cms_overall_rating: CMS Care Compare Overall Rating from Nursing Home Provider Information; contextual rating, not calculated by this tool
field_map.cms_health_inspection_rating: CMS Care Compare Health Inspection Rating from Nursing Home Provider Information; contextual rating, not calculated by this tool
field_map.cms_staffing_rating: CMS Care Compare Staffing Rating from Nursing Home Provider Information; contextual rating, not a replacement for PBJ HPRD metrics
field_map.cms_rn_staffing_rating: CMS Care Compare RN Staffing Rating from Nursing Home Provider Information when present; contextual rating, not a replacement for PBJ RN HPRD
field_map.cms_qm_rating: CMS Care Compare Quality Measures Rating from Nursing Home Provider Information; contextual rating, not calculated by this tool
field_map.cms_long_stay_qm_rating: CMS Care Compare Long-Stay Quality Measures Rating from Nursing Home Provider Information; contextual rating, not calculated by this tool
field_map.cms_short_stay_qm_rating: CMS Care Compare Short-Stay Quality Measures Rating from Nursing Home Provider Information; contextual rating, not calculated by this tool
field_map.cms_rating_source: Source label for imported CMS Care Compare rating context
field_map.cms_rating_source_note: Caveat for imported CMS Care Compare rating context
field_map.quality_measures_claims: Facility-level CMS Nursing Home Quality Measures Claims rows merged by CCN; contextual Care Compare quality-measure data, not calculated by this tool
field_map.measure_code: CMS Quality Measures Claims measure code
field_map.measure_description: CMS Quality Measures Claims measure description
field_map.resident_type: CMS Quality Measures Claims resident type
field_map.adjusted_score: CMS Quality Measures Claims adjusted score, parsed as numeric when available
field_map.observed_score: CMS Quality Measures Claims observed score, parsed as numeric when available
field_map.expected_score: CMS Quality Measures Claims expected score, parsed as numeric when available
field_map.footnote_for_score: CMS Quality Measures Claims score footnote
field_map.used_in_qm_five_star_rating: Whether CMS marks the quality measure as used in the Quality Measure Five-Star Rating
field_map.measure_period: CMS Quality Measures Claims measure period
field_map.quality_measure_source: Source label for imported CMS Quality Measures Claims row
field_map.enrollment_npi: SNF Enrollments NPI when matched by CCN; enrollment context only
field_map.enrollment_organization_name: SNF Enrollments legal organization name when matched by CCN
field_map.enrollment_doing_business_as_name: SNF Enrollments doing-business-as name when matched by CCN
field_map.enrollment_proprietary_nonprofit: SNF Enrollments proprietary/nonprofit flag when matched by CCN
field_map.enrollment_organization_type_structure: SNF Enrollments organization type/structure when matched by CCN
field_map.enrollment_nursing_home_provider_name: SNF Enrollments nursing home provider name when matched by CCN
field_map.affiliation_entity_name: SNF Enrollments affiliation entity name for future chain/affiliation analysis
field_map.affiliation_entity_id: SNF Enrollments affiliation entity ID for future chain/affiliation linkage
field_map.incorporation_state: SNF Enrollments incorporation state when matched by CCN
field_map.incorporation_date: SNF Enrollments incorporation date when matched by CCN
field_map.case_mix_total_nurse_hprd: Provider Information Case-Mix Total Nurse Staffing Hours per Resident per Day, contextual benchmark only
field_map.case_mix_rn_hprd: Provider Information Case-Mix RN Staffing Hours per Resident per Day, contextual benchmark only
field_map.case_mix_lpn_lvn_hprd: Provider Information Case-Mix LPN Staffing Hours per Resident per Day, contextual benchmark only
field_map.case_mix_nurse_aide_hprd: Provider Information Case-Mix Nurse Aide Staffing Hours per Resident per Day, contextual benchmark only
field_map.quarter: WorkDate calendar quarter, falling back to CY_Qtr when WorkDate is unavailable
field_map.average_resident_census: simple average of daily MDScensus values for the facility-quarter
field_map.total_nurse_hprd: (Hrs_RNDON + Hrs_RNadmin + Hrs_RN + Hrs_LPNadmin + Hrs_LPN + Hrs_CNA + Hrs_NAtrn + Hrs_MedAide) / resident_days
field_map.ct_direct_care_total_hprd_estimate: PBJ-derived CT screening estimate: (Hrs_RN + Hrs_LPN + Hrs_CNA + Hrs_NAtrn + Hrs_MedAide) / resident_days; excludes Hrs_RNDON, Hrs_RNadmin, and Hrs_LPNadmin.
field_map.ct_direct_care_licensed_nurse_hprd_estim: PBJ-derived CT screening estimate: (Hrs_RN + Hrs_LPN) / resident_days; excludes Hrs_RNDON, Hrs_RNadmin, and Hrs_LPNadmin.
field_map.ct_total_direct_care_minimum_hprd: Connecticut Title 19 Sec. 19-13-D8t(m)(6) total nursing and nurse's aide personnel comparison point: 3.00 HPRD.
field_map.ct_licensed_direct_care_minimum_hprd: Connecticut Title 19 Sec. 19-13-D8t(m)(6) licensed nursing personnel comparison point: 0.84 HPRD.
field_map.ct_total_direct_care_difference_from_min: ct_direct_care_total_hprd_estimate minus 3.00; PBJ-derived screening estimate only.
field_map.ct_total_direct_care_below_minimum_estim: True when the PBJ-derived CT total direct-care estimate is below 3.00 HPRD; not a formal compliance determination.
field_map.ct_licensed_direct_care_below_minimum_es: True when the PBJ-derived CT licensed direct-care estimate is below 0.84 HPRD; not a formal compliance determination.
field_map.contract_staff_pct: sum nurse category _ctr columns / total nurse category hours * 100
